    Description
    TransactionContext
    TransactionTemplate.newContext(boolean suspendMode)
    Creates a new transaction context based on the current configuration of this transaction template.

    Method
    Description
    ThreadLocal<TransactionContext>
    TransactionTemplate.contextHolder()
    Returns the thread local that holds the current transaction context.
    default Optional<TransactionContext>
    TransactionTemplate.currentContext()
    Returns the current transaction context if any.

    Description

    TransactionTemplate.execute(TransactionCallback<R> action, TransactionContext context)
    Executes the specified action in the scope of a transaction.
